_comment: Canonical branch protection config for Latimer-Woods-Tech/Factory `main`. Source of truth for the apply-sec-hardening.yml workflow. This file is PUT to https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/branches/main/protection. The `contexts` array MUST use the bare check job names (e.g. `validate`, `Analyze (javascript)`, `dependency-review`) — NOT workflow-prefixed names like `CI / validate`. Issue #529 was caused by exactly that mismatch. To change protection: edit this file, open a PR, and let the scheduled workflow apply on merge (or run apply-sec-hardening.yml manually).
